companies.name: Headroom
companies.tagline: The context optimization layer for LLM agents, cutting tokens 40-90% losslessly across text, voice, and regulated verticals.
companies.description: Headroom is the context optimization layer for LLM agents, cutting tokens 40-90% losslessly across text, voice, and regulated verticals. The open-source proxy (1,300+ GitHub stars, 40K+ PyPI downloads, 50B tokens saved) integrates with LangChain, Claude Code, Codex, and MCP.

founders.name: Tejas Chopra
founders.title: Founder & CEO
founders.bio: Senior Engineer at Netflix leading caching infrastructure on the Axion platform serving 300M+ users. Deep expertise in distributed systems, ML infrastructure, and GPU/CUDA optimization. Published author (Systems Design, Packt), LinkedIn Learning instructor, IEEE Top 30 Early Career Professionals Awardee, Tech 40 under 40, 2x TEDx speaker. Previously at Box, Datrium, Samsung, Cadence, and Apple. Master's from Carnegie Mellon University.

companies.name: ArmorIQ
companies.tagline: AI agent security platform that enforces intent-based policy at the reasoning-to-execution boundary.
companies.description: ArmorIQ is an AI agent security platform that acts as a control fabric between autonomous agents and enterprise governance domains, intercepting actions in real time and enforcing intent-based policy before any API call, data access, or workflow executes. Unlike traditional IAM or guardrails, ArmorIQ addresses the emerging threat of agents acting outside their delegated scope, blocking rogue behavior at the reasoning-to-execution boundary with full audit trails for SOC2, GDPR, and NIST compliance.

founders.name: Ram Shanmugam
founders.title: Founder & CEO
founders.bio: Ram Shanmugam has founded and exited two venture-backed AI companies: AutonomIQ (acquired by Sauce Labs), an AI testing platform that scaled to 600K+ users, and appOrbit (acquired by Cohesity), an ML-driven container automation product. He is a Research Affiliate at MIT CSAIL and a Research Fellow at UC Berkeley EECS, and has published IEEE papers on AI and automation.

founders.name: Ketan Bhardwaj
founders.title: Co-Founder & CTO
founders.bio: Ketan Bhardwaj earned his PhD in Computer Science from Georgia Tech, where he has spent over 14 years as a researcher and Senior Research Engineer. His work sits at the intersection of AI and systems, with published papers on DNN model slicing, secure edge computing, and distributed app delivery, plus two granted patents in secure mobile edge ecosystems.

founders.name: Vaibhav Bhosale
founders.title: Co-Founder & Chief Scientist
founders.bio: Vaibhav Bhosale is finishing his PhD at Georgia Tech, where his dissertation focuses on distributed computing for LEO satellite edge infrastructure. Before his doctorate, he was a software engineer at Microsoft, and has since done research stints at both Microsoft Research and MediaTek.

companies.name: AgntID
companies.tagline: Access Control Enforcement for AI Agents.
companies.description: Runtime enforcement layer for AI agent access control with scoped, ephemeral credentials per tool invocation. Intercepts agent tool calls, evaluates policy and intent, derives scoped credentials, and executes. Integrates with existing IAM and MCP ecosystems without requiring agent redesign.

founders.name: Sundar Krish
founders.title: Founder & CEO
founders.bio: Serial entrepreneur. Former CEO of Sken.ai (acquired by Fortinet). Previously founded waygum.io (acquired). Product/engineering exec with deep experience in Gen AI, IAM, cybersecurity, and DevSecOps.

founders.name: Ramanuj Pandey
founders.title: Founding CTO
founders.bio: 25+ years in security platforms. Security systems architect with deep expertise in identity & runtime authorization, enterprise & cloud infrastructure. Previously at Fortinet and Juniper.

companies.name: cognee
companies.tagline: Ontology-grounded context engine for your agents, enabling them to reason and improve over time.
companies.description: Open-source AI memory layer using vectors and knowledge graphs. Structures data into vectors and knowledge graphs, enabling persistent context and multi-agent coordination for AI applications.

founders.name: Vasilije Markovic
founders.title: Founder
founders.bio: 10+ years of experience in big data and data engineering, with a background in cognitive sciences. Has been developing cognitive approaches to memory for years. Previously at Zalando, Taxfix, Omio.

companies.name: Nimblemind
companies.tagline: AI agents for healthcare data interoperability, automating feature extraction from multi-modal healthcare data.
companies.description: Nimblemind trains and builds agents for Healthcare Data Interoperability. Nimblemind automates feature extraction from multi-modal healthcare data.

founders.name: Pi Zonooz
founders.title: CEO
founders.bio: Raised in Chicago in an immigrant family. Nuclear Engineering degrees from UIUC. Career in tech at AWS and Stripe, where he launched 40 first-party services including AWS Data Marketplace for Healthcare, led the first EPIC deployment on AWS, and built a $1B+ ARR business focused on industry solutions. Previously helped raise money and design products at Sun King and Starfire Industries. Started Nimblemind to solve thorny data/AI problems in healthcare.

founders.name: Navin Kumar
founders.title: Chief AI Officer
founders.bio: Born and raised in Singapore. PhD from Yale with Nicholas Christakis, publishing over 60 papers and raising over $1M in research funding. Worked at NYC Health + Hospitals managing data science and AI initiatives for the nation's largest public hospital system, improving outcomes for over 1M patients. Started Nimblemind to solve complex AI problems in healthcare, especially for minoritized individuals.

companies.name: Founding Dev
companies.tagline: Agentic AI editor that builds and manages custom SaaS replacements.
companies.description: Lets businesses build complex SaaS replacements (BambooHR, DocuSign, QuickBooks, etc.) from templates or scratch, then deploys and manages them through the same platform.

founders.name: Talha
founders.title: Founder
founders.bio: Second-time entrepreneur. 13+ years consulting for Scale AI, GitLab, Northwestern Mutual across engineering, product, and sales.

companies.name: WeeReel
companies.tagline: Social networking and job platform for entertainment industry creatives.
companies.description: Social networking and job platform for actors, directors, producers, crew, and comedians. Plans for LLM-based smart matching and project idea generation.

companies.name: nCompass
companies.tagline: Agentic developer tool for GPU systems and kernel performance optimization.
companies.description: Multi-agent system that gives frontier models access to runtime profiling traces (NVIDIA nsight-systems, nsight-compute), curated domain knowledge, and the ability to run profilers themselves to root-cause performance bottlenecks.

founders.name: Aditya Rajagopal
founders.title: Co-Founder & CEO
founders.bio: PhD from Imperial College London on accelerating CNNs on FPGAs and embedded GPUs. Previously on Qualcomm AI compilers team for LLMs.

founders.name: Diederik Vink
founders.title: Co-Founder & CTO
founders.bio: PhD from Imperial College London on accelerated CNN training architectures on FPGAs.

companies.name: RELAI
companies.tagline: Reliable AI agent development lifecycle: simulation, evaluation, and optimization.
companies.description: Connects to existing agents via SDK, simulates them across diverse synthetic and real-world scenarios, evaluates with Critico (LLM-as-judge, code-based, expert evaluators), and uses Maestro to holistically optimize both agent configuration and graph structure.

founders.name: Soheil Feizi
founders.title: Founder & CEO
founders.bio: Associate Professor (on leave) UMD CS. PhD MIT, postdoc Stanford. 2024 PECASE awardee. Testified before U.S. House Bipartisan Task Force on AI.

founders.name: Wenxiao Wang
founders.title: Co-Founder & Head of AI
founders.bio: PhD UMD, BS Tsinghua Yao Class. Publications at ICML, ICLR, NeurIPS. Previously at Sony AI and ByteDance.

founders.name: Priyatham Kattakinda
founders.title: Co-Founder & Technical Lead
founders.bio: PhD UMD focused on reliability for language and vision models. NSF I-Corps national.

companies.name: QBG
companies.tagline: AI deployment service for mid-market businesses.
companies.description: AI customer service and BI platform for mid-market businesses. Uses AI agents to automate consulting work, enabling enterprise-grade deployments at mid-market pricing.
